creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2007-03-19 12:33:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/bins             Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/bins/files       extra-patch-install.sh 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.1.29
  - Use DATADIR, DOCSDIR
  - Remove IS_INTERACTIVE by disabling interacting part from install.sh for
    batch mode and pointyhat build
  - Remove 4.x support
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:             ports/108289 (bsaed on)
  Submitted by:   Marcelo Araujo <araujo at bsdmail.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.14      +15 -19    ports/www/bins/Makefile

  1.6       +423 -120  ports/www/bins/pkg-plist
